payload.label: cup
payload.short_description: transparent plastic cup with blue rim
payload.long_description: Transparent disposable plastic cup (tall, tapered cylindrical shape) with a blue rim or lid visible at the top; upright and slightly edge-cropped at the bottom, with faint vertical dark markings on the side; image is low-resolution and slightly blurred, appears close to the camera (~0.4 m).

message.content: {"label":"cup","short_description":"transparent plastic cup with blue rim","long_description":"Transparent disposable plastic cup (tall, tapered cylindrical shape) with a blue rim or lid visible at the top; upright and slightly edge-cropped at the bottom, with faint vertical dark markings on the side; image is low-resolution and slightly blurred, appears close to the camera (~0.4 m).","attributes":["transparent plastic","blue rim/lid","tapered cylindrical shape","upright orientation","edge-cropped (bottom)","faint vertical markings","low-resolution/slightly blurred"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.4}
